title: Marketing management and team collaboration - in ease!
excerpt:

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are managing a marketing team, scheduling campaigns and collaborating with other teams on mutual tasks - this webinar is for you!
Learn how to work effortlessly with multiple boards, without relaying on connected boards columns or mirrors!

We will learn how to automate anything you wish to, from creating reminders at the time you need, and automating budget calculations.

Join us at:
October 9, 2024 2:00 PM→October 9, 2024 3:00 PM

Register from this link

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome event! Added this to our community calendar @Dana

posts.author: preslechoni1985 (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I had a similar issue making sure everyone was aligned on our campaign strategy and metrics. What helped us was connecting our content tracking board to a separate SEO and keyword planning board. Also, sharing this guide with the team helped explain why topic clusters and authority matter: 10 Proven Steps to Boost SEO Authority in 2025. Made it way easier for everyone to stay focused on the right content goals.
